sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_edges (id UInt64, edge UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT h3GetIndexesFromUnidirectionalEdge(edge) AS indexes FROM test_edges WHERE edge != 0 AND edge < 1248204388774707199;
SELECT id, h3GetIndexesFromUnidirectionalEdge(edge) AS indexes FROM test_edges WHERE (edge = 1248204388774707198) AND (indexOf(toString(edge), '124') > 0);
CREATE TABLE test_indexes (idx UInt64, origin UInt64, destination UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY idx;

SELECT idx, origin, destination FROM test_indexes WHERE (origin, destination) IN (SELECT h3GetIndexesFromUnidirectionalEdge(edge) FROM test_edges WHERE edge IS NOT NULL) AND (origin AND destination) != (0 AND 0);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS valid_count FROM test_edges WHERE h3GetIndexesFromUnidirectionalEdge(edge) AND edge NOT IN (SELECT NULL);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_edges AS SELECT edge FROM test_edges WHERE edge > 0;
SELECT h3GetIndexesFromUnidirectionalEdge(edge) AS indexes FROM temp_edges GROUP BY indexes HAVING (count(indexes) > 1) AND (origin AND destination) = (1 AND 1);
